scope: AgenC server-side MCP framework core before transports and tool registration.

requiredBehaviors: initialize echoes the negotiated protocol version
initialize returns AgenC server metadata and declared capabilities
the framework records client info and initialized state
a repeated initialize request returns a JSON-RPC invalid-request error
edgeCases: missing initialize params fall back to the default protocol version
notifications/initialized is recorded without producing a response

requiredBehaviors: tools/list returns an empty list until MS-02 adds registration
unsupported MCP requests return method-not-found errors
ordinary requests before initialize return an explicit not-initialized error
edgeCases: invalid request objects return invalid-request errors
bad raw JSON returns parse errors

requiredBehaviors: success responses include jsonrpc, id, and result
error responses include jsonrpc, id, and an error object
server-originated requests generate ids and invoke callbacks when client responses arrive
server-originated notifications omit ids and need no callback
outgoing framework messages can be serialized by later transports
edgeCases: invalid JSON-RPC ids are rejected before dispatch
malformed initialize params return invalid-params errors
transport serialization has an internal-error fallback
